title: OpenClaw should not route native Discord shortcuts through the plugin-command Done fallback

source.license_note: Localized ACBench reproduction derived from openclaw/openclaw issue #50111.

task.summary: Repair Discord shortcut dispatch so native slash commands skip the plugin-command Done fallback.
task.instructions: Investigate why native slash shortcuts match the plugin-command path, repair the dispatch order so native interactions return native output first, and preserve the text plugin-command behavior.
task.acceptance_notes: Alternative fixes are allowed as long as native slash shortcuts stop returning Done.

visible_context.issue_text: Most Discord native slash commands respond with just `Done` because they are routed through a text-style plugin command path.
error_logs: native slash command built a prompt string and matched a plugin command
plugin reply was not renderable, so the gateway sent Done.
reproduction_steps: Run the unit tests from the repository root.
visible_context.notes: This fixture models the command-routing order behind the Done fallback.

code_fault.description: Native slash interactions are routed through the plugin-command path before the native handler can respond.

constraints.notes: This GitHub-derived reproduction is expected to be repaired in code, not by changing tests.

notes: Code-only localized reproduction of openclaw/openclaw issue #50111.
